target: Awwwards-worthy premium site — M-International (MLM/БАДы, CIS market)

constraints.animation: Framer Motion + GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lenis (desktop only)

roadmap.title: Elite Arsenal — Create 7 Managed Skills
roadmap.description: Create 7 .md skill files in /storage/managed_skills/ covering: popular-web-designs (Stripe/Linear/Awwwards patterns), motion-dev (Framer Motion + GSAP + Lenis), nextjs16-best-practices (RSC, streaming, optimization), threejs-particles (digital dust WebGL background), shadcn-premium-ui (atomic reusable components), style-transfer (Awwwards visual language adaptation), performance-guardian (Core Web Vitals checklist).
acceptance_criteria: All 7 skill files exist and are complete
Each skill has actionable code examples
CIS adaptation rules documented in relevant skills

roadmap.title: Three.js Digital Dust Background — Installation & Scene
roadmap.description: Install three + @types/three. Create ThreeBackground component with: custom ShaderMaterial particles (2000 count),InteractiveGrid helper, mouse parallax tracking, adaptive quality by device (500-2500 particles), proper cleanup on unmount. Use dynamic import with ssr:false in Hero.
deliverables: Hero.tsx — updated with dynamic ThreeBackground import
acceptance_criteria: Particle system renders at 60fps on mid-range desktop
Particles drift gently with sin/cos wave motion
Mouse parallax subtly shifts particles (±2 units)
Grid visible below particles (8% opacity emerald)
Reduced motion: CSS-only fallback (30 dust particles)

roadmap.title: UI Component Audit — Remove Dead Code, Fix Typography
roadmap.description: Audit all UI components against shadcn-premium-ui skill. Fix: Unbounded used ONLY for headings >=20px, Onest for ALL body/UI text. Remove: gradient-text usage, glassmorphism as default, identical card grids, any DM Sans/Inter/Space Grotesk imports. Ensure: line-height >= 1.1 headings, letter-spacing normal on Cyrillic, touch targets >=44px.
deliverables: All components audited: Button, Badge, Container, SectionHeader, GlassCard, Skeleton, Card, Input, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Onest for ALL body, buttons, nav, product text, captions
letter-spacing: normal on all Cyrillic text
No Inter, DM Sans, Space Grotesk, Fraunces, Cormorant imports
GlassCard exists but NOT used as default (opt-in only)
focus-visible ring on all interactive elements

roadmap.title: Hero Section — Awwwards-Level Cinematic Redesign
roadmap.description: Redesign Hero using style-transfer skill patterns. Implement: Three.js particle background (dynamic import), word-by-word text reveal via TextRevealWords, parallax on background (scale 1→1.15, translateY 0→30%), trust badge bar (GMP/ISO/Halal + 50+ countries), dual CTA layout, dot grid overlay with radial mask, noise texture (3% opacity), bottom gradient bleed. Mobile: simplified reveal, no heavy blur.
acceptance_criteria: Text reveal: word-by-word on desktop, section-level on mobile
Parallax: background moves at different rate than content
Trust badges: GMP, ISO, Halal + 50+ countries, 10K+ partners
prefers-reduced-motion: all animations disabled, content visible
Mobile: no heavy blur/backdrop-filter, simplified animations

roadmap.title: Scroll Animation System — GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lenis
roadmap.description: Build comprehensive scroll animation system using motion-dev skill. Lenis smooth scroll (desktop >=768px only), GSAP ScrollTrigger for section reveals, Apple-style text reveal component (reusable), parallax layers, stagger animations for card grids. All animations: transform + opacity only, ease-out curves, 0.7s duration, 0.06s stagger.
deliverables: src/lib/scroll.ts — Lenis init, GSAP ScrollTrigger config
acceptance_criteria: Lenis smooth scroll on desktop (>=768px), disabled on mobile
GSAP ScrollTrigger: section reveals, 0.7s duration, power3.out
TextReveal: supports word-by-word and character modes
All animations use transform + opacity only
No layout thrashing, will-change used appropriately

roadmap.title: Certificates Marquee — Infinite Scroll + Trust Bar
roadmap.description: Build horizontal infinite marquee for certification badges (GMP, ISO, Halal, FDA, HACCP). CSS-only animation for 60fps. Seamless loop, pause on hover, reduced-motion fallback (static row). Logos as optimized SVG.
acceptance_criteria: Infinite horizontal scroll with seamless loop (no visible jump)
Cert logos: optimized SVG, consistent sizing, proper alt text
Works on mobile with touch support

roadmap.title: Products Section — Asymmetric Premium Grid
roadmap.description: Redesign products section with asymmetric card grid. Rich imagery, Onest font for product names, 1-2 line descriptions. Hover: scale(1.02) + shadow. 2 visual tiers (featured + standard). Mobile: horizontal scroll with snap. No glassmorphism. All images WebP <=100KB.
deliverables: ProductCard.tsx — redesigned with Onest font, hover interactions
acceptance_criteria: Asymmetric grid with varied card sizes (NOT identical)
Mobile: horizontal scroll with touch snap

roadmap.title: About Section — Editorial Layout with Timeline
roadmap.description: Redesign About with editorial, magazine-style layout. Alternating image/text blocks, company timeline with GSAP ScrollTrigger reveal, values as large icons + short text (1-2 lines max). NOT 2x2 grid.

roadmap.title: Business Section — Trust-Focused Conversion Layout
roadmap.description: Redesign Business section for MLM partner conversion without cheap tropes. Asymmetric layout, 3-step process, social proof, benefit cards with varied sizes, single prominent CTA. NO aggressive 'financial freedom' language. Tone: professional, science-backed.
acceptance_criteria: Asymmetric layout (NOT centered, NOT identical cards)

roadmap.title: CTA Section — Asymmetric Conversion Block
roadmap.description: Final CTA: large Unbounded headline (1-2 lines), single sentence Onest subtext, two buttons (primary + outline), subtle dot pattern background. Scroll-triggered entrance. No floating particles or decorative orbs.

roadmap.title: Navbar — Premium Navigation with Scroll Behavior
roadmap.description: Enhance Navbar: transparent→solid on scroll (0.3s), SVG logo, Onest font nav links, language switcher (RU/EN/KZ), animated mobile hamburger, CTA button in nav, active section indicator. No glassmorphism.
acceptance_criteria: Transparent on hero → solid on scroll (0.3s)
No glassmorphism, solid bg when scrolled

roadmap.title: Content — Humanized RU/EN/KZ Translations
roadmap.description: Create and humanize all site copy in 3 languages. Focus on short text (1-3 lines per block), NO AI-isms. Use humanizer + humanizer-ru. Tone: premium, science-backed, professional.
acceptance_criteria: All 3 languages: complete coverage (no missing keys)
Russian: humanized via humanizer-ru, NO AI-isms
No em dashes, no 'leverage', no 'synergy', no 'paradigm shift'

roadmap.title: Dead Code Removal + TypeScript Strict + Build 100/100
roadmap.description: Remove all dead/unused code. Ensure TypeScript strict mode passes with zero errors. Remove any 'any' types. Remove unused CSS classes. Ensure ESLint passes. Build must complete with zero errors and zero warnings.
deliverables: Removed: dead components, unused imports, unused CSS, duplicate code
ESLint: npm run lint — zero errors
Build: npm run build — zero errors, zero warnings

roadmap.title: Core Web Vitals Optimization — LCP/INP/CLS/TBT
roadmap.description: Full performance optimization pass using performance-guardian skill. Target: LCP <2.5s, INP <200ms, CLS <0.1, TBT <200ms. Optimize all images, preload critical resources, implement streaming, code-split heavy libs, audit with Lighthouse.
deliverables: next.config.ts — image optimization, preload headers, compression
public/images/ — all WebP, proper sizes, srcset
acceptance_criteria: All images: WebP, srcset, lazy loaded (except hero LCP)

roadmap.title: Vercel Deploy + Post-Launch Monitoring
roadmap.description: Deploy to Vercel. Configure custom domain, Vercel Analytics, preview deployments. Post-launch: monitor Core Web Vitals in real-time, verify i18n, test checkout/conversion flow.
acceptance_criteria: i18n: language switcher changes URL and content
